name: swing-mcp
description: MCP server for automating Java Swing applications.
long_description: Swing MCP lets AI agents drive any Java Swing application. Launch a JVM with the bundled agent preloaded (or attach to a running JVM by PID), take accessibility-style snapshots of the component tree, and interact via tools such as click, fill, select_option, press_key, and take_screenshot. Requires a Java 21+ runtime on the PATH.

tools.name: launch_app
tools.description: Launch a Swing application JVM with the automation agent preloaded

tools.name: attach_to_app
tools.description: Attach the automation agent to a running Swing JVM by PID

tools.name: app_status
tools.description: Report the status of the current session

tools.name: take_snapshot
tools.description: Snapshot the Swing component tree with component UIDs

tools.name: get_component_details
tools.description: Get detailed properties of a component by UID

tools.name: find_component
tools.description: Find components by text, name, tooltip, or class

tools.name: get_table_data
tools.description: Read the contents of a JTable

tools.name: get_list_items
tools.description: Read the items of a JList or JTree

tools.name: select_window
tools.description: Bring a window to the front

tools.name: fill
tools.description: Set the value of a text field, spinner, or slider

tools.name: select_option
tools.description: Select an option in a combo box or list

tools.name: select_tree_node
tools.description: Select a JTree node by path

tools.name: select_menu_item
tools.description: Invoke a menu item by path

tools.name: press_key
tools.description: Press a key or key combination

tools.name: drag
tools.description: Drag from one component to another

tools.name: handle_dialog
tools.description: Click a button in an open dialog

tools.name: take_screenshot
tools.description: Capture a screenshot of a window or component

tools.name: evaluate_java
tools.description: Evaluate Java code in the target JVM (disabled by default)
